mapper.select: /* SQL ID : listLessonScheduleAll 설 명 : 주차 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT LCTR_SCHDL_ID , SBJCT_ID , LCTR_SCHDLNM , LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ , LCTR_TYCD , LCTR_GOAL , LCTR_OTLN , LCTR_REF_DATA , LCTR_SYMD , LCTR_EYMD , OYN , LCTR_TOC_LRN_SCNDS , LCTR_NOTE , DELYN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE 1 = 1 AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ

/* SQL ID : listLessonTimeAll 설 명 : 주차 교시 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.LCTR_CLASTMNM , A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ORDER BY B.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ, A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ

/* SQL ID : listLessonTimeByScheduleId 설 명 : 주차 교시 목록 (by lessonScheduleId) */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.LCTR_CLASTMNM , A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} ORDER BY A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectLessonTime 설 명 : 주차 교시 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.LCTR_CLASTMNM , A.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId}

/* SQL ID : listLessonCntsAll 설 명 : 주차 콘텐츠 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LESSON_TYPE_CD , A.LCTR_CONTSNM , A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , A.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , A.PRG_RFLTYN , A.LCTR_SDTTM , A.LCTR_EDTTM , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH , A.LESSON_CNTS_URL , A.RCMD_ATNDLC_MNTS , A.PRGRT_TYCD , A.INQYN , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_YN , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_NM , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_PATH , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_URL FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} ORDER BY C.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ, B.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ, A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : listLessonCntsByLessonTime 설 명 : 주차, 교시의 콘텐츠 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.SBJCT_ID , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , A.LESSON_TYPE_CD , A.LCTR_CONTSNM , A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , A.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD , A.PRG_RFLTYN , A.LCTR_SDTTM , A.LCTR_EDTTM , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_LOC_CD , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_NM , A.LESSON_CNTS_FILE_PATH , A.LESSON_CNTS_URL , A.RCMD_ATNDLC_MNTS , A.PRGRT_TYCD , A.INQYN , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_YN , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_NM , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_PATH , A.LESSON_DATA_FILE_URL , A.CONTS_TXT , A.SUBTIT_KO , A.SUBTIT_EN , A.SCRIPT_KO , A.SCRIPT_EN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId} AND A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ( A.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD != 'VIDEO_LINK' OR ( A.LCTR_CONTS_GBNCD = 'VIDEO_LINK' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE WHERE SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID ) ) ) ORDER BY A.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : listLessonPageBySchedule 설 명 : 주차 콘텐츠 페이지 목록 조회(by lessonScheduleId) */ SELECT C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID , C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID , B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , A.PAGE_SEQNO , A.ULD_GBNCD , A.PAGENM , A.URL , A.VDO_MNTS , NVL(A.ATNDC_RFLTYN,'Y') ATNDC_RFLTYN , NVL(A.OYN,'Y') OYN FROM SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_PAGE A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS B, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} ORDER BY C.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ, B.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ, A.PAGE_SEQNO*1

/* SQL ID : listLessonCntsViewYn 설 명 : 학습여부 목록 조회 */ SELECT B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID , B.LCTR_CONTSNM , B.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ , IF(C.STD_ID IS NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS INQYN FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM A JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_LESSON_STUDY_RECORD C ON B.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = C.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AND C.STD_ID = #{stdNo} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = #{lessonTimeId} ORDER BY B.LCTR_CONTS_SEQ

/* SQL ID : selectLessonCnts 설 명 : 학습 콘텐츠 정보 조회 */ SELECT C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AS lessonScheduleId , A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID AS lessonCntsId , B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AS lessonTimeId , C.LCTR_SCHDL_SEQ AS lessonScheduleOrder , A.LCTR_CONTSNM AS lessonCntsNm , B.LCTR_CLASTM_SEQ AS lessonTimeOrder FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS A, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM B, TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID = B.SBJCT_LCTR_CLASTM_ID AND B.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND C.DELYN = 'N' AND C.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND C.LCTR_SCHDL_ID = #{lessonScheduleId} AND A.SBJCT_LCTR_CONTS_ID = #{lessonCntsId}

/* SQL ID : LessonDAO.countCntsUsage 설 명 : 콘텐츠 현황 목록 수 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z
